partnerships.title: Partner with TalepNET to help teams modernize procurement
partnerships.description: We are open to selective partnerships that can help customers adopt stronger procurement workflows while creating commercial value for the right partner model.
partnerships.fit: Best fit for consultants, implementation partners, and procurement-focused ecosystem collaborations.

areas.title: Referral partnerships
areas.text: For consultants, operators, and advisors who want to introduce TalepNET to teams with procurement workflow needs and create new revenue opportunities around qualified demand.

areas.title: Implementation support
areas.text: For partners who can expand their service offering through rollout, configuration, onboarding, and change management support.

areas.title: Ecosystem collaboration
areas.text: For organizations exploring complementary integration, co-sell, or channel opportunities around modern procurement operations.

partnerships.ctaText: If you see a fit around referrals, implementation, or broader collaboration, reach out and we can discuss the right model.

testimonial.title: Customer feedback and product trust signals
testimonial.description: See how teams describe their experience with TalepNET, from day-to-day usability to clearer procurement control.

changelog.title: Changelog
changelog.description: Track product updates, fixes, and release notes in one place so teams can stay aligned with what changed in TalepNET.
